title: tephrosia paradoxa
intro: Tephrosia paradoxa, also known as the Horsefly Tree or Devil's Thorn, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Tephrosia paradoxa include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
